metadata.description: Sam Dumont's personal collection of Claude Code skills for writing voice consistency and architectural patterns

plugins.name: sams-voice
plugins.description: Apply Sam Dumont's personal writing voice and style when drafting any written content. Works in English and French.

plugins.name: sams-architecture
plugins.description: Codifies Sam's mature architectural patterns for Python APIs, infrastructure/DevOps, Garmin/embedded systems, and frontend projects. Enforces Service→Repository→Database pattern, 80% test coverage, comprehensive CI/CD, and zero-tolerance security standards.

plugins.name: outcome-engineering
plugins.description: Reframes tasks as measurable outcomes using o16g principles. Adds outcome specification, execution guardrails, and validation to any workflow.

plugins.name: technical-blog-post
plugins.description: Process skill for turning raw project data into structured technical blog posts. Covers gathering, extraction, structure, and Astro frontmatter.

plugins.name: sketch-checker
plugins.description: Research whether a metal band has ties to far-right, NSBM, or fascist movements. Uses parallel research agents with tiered verdicts for both historical and current status.

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Comprehensive Python code quality skill. Sets up and runs ruff (lint + format), mypy (type checking), xenon (cyclomatic complexity), vulture (dead code), file-length gates, and pre-commit hooks. Provides a full Makefile-based workflow using uv for fast package management.

plugins.name: advanced-code-quality
plugins.description: Advanced Python code quality gates beyond basic linting. Covers cognitive complexity (complexipy), code duplication (jscpd), architectural enforcement (import-linter), dependency hygiene (deptry), test quality gates (diff-cover, mutmut), docstring coverage (interrogate), and AI-generated code detection (sloppylint). Complements the code-quality skill with 20+ additional tools.

plugins.name: code-security
plugins.description: Comprehensive Python code security skill combining static analysis tools (Bandit, pip-audit, safety) with LLM-powered dynamic analysis. Claude actively reviews code for injection vulnerabilities, path traversal, insecure deserialization, secrets exposure, auth bypasses, and logic flaws that static tools miss.
